component.name: Xpra Client
component.summary: Multi-platform screen and application forwarding client

description.p: Xpra is known as "screen for X": its seamless mode allows you to run X11 programs, usually on a remote host, direct their display to your local machine, and then to disconnect from these programs and reconnect from the same or another machine(s), without losing any state.

This package includes the Xpra client for connecting to remote Xpra servers. Xpra forwards and synchronizes many extra desktop features including audio input and output, printers, clipboard, system trays, notifications, webcams, and more.

ul.li: Connect to remote displays and applications
Seamless window integration with your desktop
Support for multiple connection protocols (SSH, SSL, TCP, etc.)
